name: Eggnog-Poppy Seed Bread
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Grease the bottom only of one 9 x 5 x 3-inch loaf pan or two 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 2 1/2-inch loaf pans. In a large bowl, combine all of the ingredients and beat for 30 seconds. Pour into the prepared pan(s). Bake for 55 to 65 minutes (9-inch loaf), 55 to 60 minutes (8-inch loaf) or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean; cool slightly. Loosen sides of the loaf from the pan and remove from the pan. Cool completely on a wire rack before slicing. Wrap and refrigerate for up to 1 week.
